top_signals.title: AvalonBay, Equity Residential Said to Near Mega-REIT Tie-Up
top_signals.summary: AvalonBay Communities Inc. and Equity Residential are nearing a deal that will see two of the biggest real estate investment trusts by value combine, people familiar with the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
